title: NoF3Screen
description: Toggle F3 Screen on the client side to never accidently leak your coords again
body:
NoF3Screen is a lightweight Minecraft mod that gives you control over the F3 debug overlay with a simple keybinding. Perfect for players who want a clean screenshot or recording without the cluttered debug information, but still need easy access to F3 when necessary.

## Features

- **Toggle F3 On/Off**: Press F6 (configurable) to instantly hide or show the F3 debug overlay
- **Persistent Settings**: Your preference is remembered between game sessions
- **ModMenu Integration**: Easily configure the mod through ModMenu if installed
- **Minimal Performance Impact**: Lightweight implementation with no gameplay changes

## Why NoF3Screen?

For SMP players and streamers, accidentally revealing your coordinates can be disastrous. Whether you're building a secret base, hiding valuable resources, or trying to avoid stream snipers, exposing your location through the F3 debug screen is a common mistake that can ruin hours of gameplay.

NoF3Screen solves this problem by letting you disable the debug overlay with a single keypress before you start streaming or recording. When you need to check your coordinates privately, simply toggle it back on. No more accidentally leaking your location or having to awkwardly hide your screen mid-stream!

## Configuration

- Default key to toggle F3: F6 (can be changed in game settings)
- Enable/disable the toggle via ModMenu if installed
- Works with all Minecraft settings and other mods that don't modify the F3 overlay

## Compatibility

- Works with Minecraft 1.21.4 and 1.21.5
- Requires Fabric API
- Optional ModMenu support
- Minimal dependency footprint

Simple, useful, and stays out of your way - NoF3Screen enhances your Minecraft experience without changing how the game works.
